operation.label: Trigger activation
operation.description: Activate a trigger and patch all affected downstream dependencies.

affected_closure.label: Identify target jurisdiction, permitting authority, discharge class, receiving-water context, and permit pathway.
Collect influent profile and pilot-performance evidence for the actual wastewater stream.
Verify accountable partner/operator path and customer commitment terms.
Approve reversible diligence and block launch or customer promises until the compliance/business gate receives site-specific evidence.
Jurisdiction, permitting authority, discharge class, and receiving-water context are not fixed for the opportunity.
Influent profile and treatment proof for the actual wastewater stream are not fixed.
Partner path and customer commitment are not fixed.

changed_decision_meaning: Trigger activation changes T1:trigger; 9 downstream object(s) are in closure, so the current decision rendering must be regenerated.

semantic_patch_operations.effect: Activate a trigger and patch all affected downstream dependencies.
Render a new decision view after validation passes.

patch_report.summary: trigger_activation on T1 affects 9 downstream object(s); transition=patch; rendering=affected
next_steps: rerun validation after applying any object edits
record trigger state change in patch history or review log
